summary: iOS | Free 60 artwork missing, and update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest not working (Studio iOS or PTT)
scenario: Poly Voyager Free 60+ artwork missing and firmware update fails from v231.591.0.5046 via Poly Studio Mobile iOS app or PTT
description_clean: On iOS, the Poly Voyager Free 60+ artwork is missing, and firmware update from version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest is not working via the Poly Studio Mobile iOS app or PTT.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Verify the Poly Voyager Free 60+ device artwork is displayed
Go to Device Settings → [Poly Voyager Free 60+] → Firmware Update
Attempt to update firmware from version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest version
Alternatively, attempt firmware update via PTT (Push-to-Talk) app
expected: Poly Voyager Free 60+ device artwork is displayed correctly in the app. Firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest version completes successfully via both Poly Studio Mobile iOS app and PTT.
actual: Poly Voyager Free 60+ artwork is missing in the Poly Studio Mobile iOS app. Firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to the latest fails via both Poly Studio Mobile iOS app and PTT.
